The '''Intergalactic Musicians' Guild''' was an association of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] musicians. The [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Figrin D'an/Legends|Figrin D'an]] and his band [[Figrin D'an and the Modal Nodes/Legends|Modal Nodes]] were members of the Guild.

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Trouble on Cloud City]]'' {{1stm}}
